name: historical_notes
Battle of Alesia: Compressed Alesia encirclement: Vercingetorix is trapped in the oppidum inside Caesar's circumvallation while the Gallic relief army attacks the outer contravallation from surrounding heights.

name: ROMAN
column4: hold the circumvallation and shift legions to any threatened sector
column5: contain the oppidum while repelling the relief army from the surrounding heights

name: GALLIC
column4: coordinate Vercingetorix's sortie with the relief attack on weak Roman sectors
column5: break the double ring and reopen the Mandubii stronghold
